content.text: Confirmed: the idempotency check returns `ok: false`, indicating this action (or its action_hash) matches a recent duplicate within the lookback window.

input.rationale: check_action_idempotency returned ok:false, indicating this add_to_routine action (action_hash 8bcef2ba...) is a duplicate of one already processed within the lookback window for this family. Per policy, duplicate actions are a clear rejection criterion regardless of the action's otherwise low-risk, internal-only nature. Other tool calls (time window, PII leak, calendar conflict) could not be fully evaluated due to missing required fields (proposedExecutionAt, content/allowedRecipients, startsAt/durationMinutes) in the draft payload, but the duplicate finding alone is sufficient grounds for rejection.
input.remediation: Do not re-submit this add_to_routine action for candidate cand-earlyon-1 unless it has been more than the dedup window since the prior identical action, or unless the payload has materially changed (new action_hash). If the Drafter believes this is not truly a duplicate (e.g., routine info has been updated), regenerate the action_hash to reflect the updated content and re-submit with complete fields (proposedExecutionAt, startsAt/durationMinutes if scheduling is intended) so all checks can run cleanly.
